flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Riverside City College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($628 → $817).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Riverside City College fell 29% between 2007 and 2010 (67.4% → 48.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Riverside City College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Riverside City College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
